story.text:
# ✨ Spawn Agent
**🪶 → ✨ → 🧬 → 🌱**
*faunia · spawning · V59*

The Spawn phase of Run · Evoke · Spawn: instantiate a substrate instance against the Mage's chosen framework. Witness the substrate-instance becoming operational.

> The wild thing is born here. The witness is the proof that the birth happened.

*Keywords:* spawn · instantiate · substrate · witness · v59
